Follow up with them as soon as possible\\\\./i,\\n  /This buyer has been pre-screened and has a clear request/i,\\n  /Since you have read the conversation/i,\\n];\\n\\n// ====== 表情/单字模式 ======\\nconst EMOJI_SINGLE_PATTERNS = [\\n  /^[\\\\u{1F000}-\\\\u{1FFFF}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{2600}-\\\\u{27BF}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{FE00}-\\\\u{FEFF}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{2702}-\\\\u{27B0}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{1F600}-\\\\u{1F64F}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{1F300}-\\\\u{1F5FF}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{1F680}-\\\\u{1F6FF}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{1F900}-\\\\u{1F9FF}]+$/u,\\n  /^(ok|okay|yes|no|hi|hello|hey|thanks|thx|ty|bye|good|nice|wow)$/i,\\n  /^[\\\\u{1F600}-\\\\u{1FAFF}\\\\u{2600}-\\\\u{27BF}\\\\u{1F300}-\\\\u{1F5FF}\\\\u{1F680}-\\\\u{1F6FF}\\\\u{1F900}-\\\\u{1F9FF}\\\\u{2700}-\\\\u{27BF}]+$/u,\\n  /^\\\\[图片\\\\]$/, /^\\\\[商品\\\\]$/, /^\\\\[表情\\\\]$/,\\n];\\n\\n// ====== 产品代码模式 ======\\nconst PRODUCT_CODE_RE = /(?:CO|PO|BO|SO|MO|SKU)[-_\\\\s]?\\\\d{2,4}/gi;\\n\\n// ====== 地址关键词 ======\\nconst ADDRESS_KEYWORDS = [\\n  /address/i, /shipping/i, /delivery/i, /地址/, /收货/, /运送/,\\n  /street/i, /city/i, /country/i, /zip/i, /postal/i,\\n  /cameroon/i, /nigeria/i, /kenya/i, /ghana/i, /tanzania/i, /uganda/i, /zambia/i,\\n  /saudi/i, /uae/i, /dubai/i, /egypt/i, /sudan/i, /morocco/i, /algeria/i,\\n  /colombia/i, /brazil/i, /mexico/i, /peru/i, /chile/i,\\n  /cotonou/i, /lagos/i, /nairobi/i, /doha/i, /riyadh/i, /jeddah/i,\\n  /port/i, /airport/i, /seaport/i, /via /, /to /,\\n];\\n\\n// ====== 工具函数 ======\\n\\nfunction isSystemMessage(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return false;\\n  if (text.trim().length === 0) return false;\\n  return SYSTEM_MSG_PATTERNS.some((p) => p.test(text));\\n}\\n\\nfunction isEmojiOrSingleWord(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return false;\\n  const trimmed = text.trim();\\n  if (trimmed.length === 0) return true;\\n  if (trimmed.length <= 3) return true;\\n  return EMOJI_SINGLE_PATTERNS.some((p) => p.test(trimmed));\\n}\\n\\nfunction scanProductCodes(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return [];\\n  const matches = text.match(PRODUCT_CODE_RE) || [];\\n  return [...new Set(matches.map((m) => m.toUpperCase()))];\\n}\\n\\nfunction scanAddressKeywords(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return false;\\n  return ADDRESS_KEYWORDS.some((re) => re.test(text));\\n}\\n\\nfunction calcSilenceDays(lastContactTime) {\\n  if (!lastContactTime) return 999;\\n  const now = Date.now();\\n  const ts = typeof lastContactTime === 'number' ? lastContactTime : new Date(lastContactTime).getTime();\\n  if (isNaN(ts)) return 999;\\n  return Math.floor((now - ts) / 86400000);\\n}\\n\\nfunction calcMessageDirection(messages) {\\n  if (!Array.isArray(messages) || messages.length === 0) return null;\\n  let sent = 0;\\n  let received = 0;\\n  for (const msg of messages) {\\n    if (msg.side === 'sent' || msg.latestMessageType === 'send') sent++;\\n    else if (msg.side === 'received' || msg.latestMessageType === 'received') received++;\\n  }\\n  const total = sent + received;\\n  return {\\n    total,\\n    sent,\\n    received,\\n    ratioFromUs: total > 0 ? (sent / total) : 0,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\nfunction findLatestRealMessage(messages) {\\n  if (!Array.isArray(messages)) return null;\\n  for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\\n    const msg = messages[i];\\n    const text = msg.text || msg.latestMessageContent || '';\\n    if (!isSystemMessage(text)) return msg;\\n  }\\n  return null;\\n}\\n\\n// ====== 主处理函数 ======\\n\\nfunction getCustomersFromData(data) {\\n  if (Array.isArray(data)) return data;\\n  if (data.customers) return data.customers;\\n  if (data.p0p1) return data.p0p1;\\n  if (data.results) return data.results;\\n  return [];\\n}\\n\\nfunction processCustomer(customer) {\\n  const entry = { ...customer };\\n  const flags = {};\\n  const issues = [];\\n\\n  const rawMsg = entry.latestMessageContent || '';\\n  const isSys = isSystemMessage(rawMsg);\\n\\n  // 1. 系统消息检测\\n  flags.isLatestSystemMsg = isSys;\\n  if (isSys) {\\n    issues.push('latestMessageContent 是系统消息');\\n    // 尝试从消息列表中找真实消息\\n    if (Array.isArray(entry.messages)) {\\n      const real = findLatestRealMessage(entry.messages);\\n      if (real) {\\n        entry._replacedMessageContent = real.text || real.latestMessageContent || '';\\n        entry._replacedFromIndex = entry.messages.indexOf(real);\\n        flags.latestMsgReplaced = true;\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // 2. 表情/单字检测\\n  const effectiveMsg = flags.latestMsgReplaced ? entry._replacedMessageContent : rawMsg;\\n  if (isEmojiOrSingleWord(effectiveMsg)) {\\n    flags.needLookback = true;\\n    issues.push('最后一条有效消息是表情/单字，需往前看');\\n  }\\n\\n  // 3. 消息数统计\\n  const msgCount = entry.messageCount || (Array.isArray(entry.messages) ? entry.messages.length : 0);\\n  entry._computedMessageCount = msgCount;\\n  if (msgCount >= 10) {\\n    flags.needFullRead = true;\\n    issues.push(`消息数 ${msgCount} ≥ 10，必须逐条读取`);\\n  }\\n\\n  // 4. 产品代码扫描\\n  const scanTargets = [effectiveMsg];\\n  if (Array.isArray(entry.messages)) {\\n    for (const m of entry.messages) {\\n      scanTargets.push(m.text || '');\\n    }\\n  }\\n  const allCodes = [];\\n  for (const t of scanTargets) {\\n    allCodes.push(...scanProductCodes(t));\\n  }\\n  const uniqueCodes = [...new Set(allCodes)];\\n  if (uniqueCodes.length > 0) {\\n    flags.hasProductSelection = true;\\n    entry._productCodes = uniqueCodes;\\n  }\\n\\n  // 5. 地址关键词扫描\\n  if (scanAddressKeywords(effectiveMsg) || (Array.isArray(entry.messages) && entry.messages.some((m) => scanAddressKeywords(m.text || '')))) {\\n    flags.hasAddress = true;\\n  }\\n\\n  // 6. 沉默天数\\n  const lastTime = entry.lastContactTime || entry.latestMessageTime;\\n  const silenceDays = calcSilenceDays(lastTime);\\n  entry._silenceDays = silenceDays;\\n\\n  // 7. 消息方向\\n  if (Array.isArray(entry.messages)) {\\n    const dir = calcMessageDirection(entry.messages);\\n    if (dir) {\\n      entry._messageDirection = dir;\\n    }\\n  } else if (entry.latestMessageType) {\\n    entry._messageDirection = {\\n      total: msgCount || 1,\\n      latestDirection: entry.latestMessageType,\\n    };\\n  }\\n\\n  // 8. 合并标记\\n  entry._flags = flags;\\n  entry._issues = issues;\\n\\n  return entry;\\n}\\n\\nfunction processAll(data) {\\n  const customers = getCustomersFromData(data);\\n  const cleaned = customers.map(processCustomer);\\n\\n  const stats = {\\n    total: cleaned.length,\\n    systemMsgDetected: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.isLatestSystemMsg).length,\\n    needLookback: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.needLookback).length,\\n    needFullRead: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.needFullRead).length,\\n    hasProductSelection: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.hasProductSelection).length,\\n    hasAddress: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.hasAddress).length,\\n    hasIssues: cleaned.filter((c) => c._issues.length > 0).length,\\n    silentOver90Days: cleaned.filter((c) => c._silenceDays > 90).length,\\n    silentOver30Days: cleaned.filter((c) => c._silenceDays > 30).length,\\n  };\\n\\n  return {\\n    processedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\\n    source: data.capturedAt || data.scrapedAt || 'unknown',\\n    stats,\\n    customers: cleaned,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n// ====== CLI入口 ======\\n\\nfunction findLatestInput() {\\n  const files = fs.readdirSync(DATA_DIR).filter((f) => f.endsWith('.json'));\\n  const candidates = [];\\n\\n  for (const f of files) {\\n    const fullPath = path.join(DATA_DIR, f);\\n    try {\\n      const stat = fs.statSync(fullPath);\\n      if (stat.size > 1000) {\\n        // 优先全量客户分类，其次 extracted\\n        if (f.includes('全量客户分类')) {\\n          candidates.push({ file: f, mtime: stat.mtimeMs, priority: 10 });\\n        } else if (f.startsWith('extracted_')) {\\n          candidates.push({ file: f, mtime: stat.mtimeMs, priority: 5 });\\n        }\\n      }\\n    } catch (_) { /* skip */ }\\n  }\\n\\n  candidates.sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority || b.mtime - a.mtime);\\n  return candidates[0]?.file || null;\\n}\\n\\nfunction main() {\\n  const inputArg = process.argv[2];\\n  let inputFile;\\n\\n  if (inputArg) {\\n    inputFile = path.resolve(inputArg);\\n  } else {\\n    const latest = findLatestInput();\\n    if (!latest) {\\n      console.error('未找到输入数据文件。请指定文件路径：node preprocess_cdp.js <data-file>');\\n      process.exit(1);\\n    }\\n    inputFile = path.join(DATA_DIR, latest);\\n  }\\n\\n  if (!fs.existsSync(inputFile)) {\\n    console.error(`文件不存在: ${inputFile}`);\\n    process.exit(1);\\n  }\\n\\n  console.log(`读取: ${path.basename(inputFile)}`);\\n  const raw = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(inputFile, 'utf-8'));\\n  const result = processAll(raw);\\n\\n  const ts = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-').slice(0, 19);\\n  const outFile = path.join(DATA_DIR, `cleaned_${ts}.json`);\\n  fs.writeFileSync(outFile, JSON.stringify(result, null, 2), 'utf-8');\\n\\n  console.log(`输出: ${path.basename(outFile)}`);\\n  console.log(`统计: ${result.stats.total} 个客户`);\\n  console.log(`  系统消息检测: ${result.stats.systemMsgDetected}`);\\n  console.log(`  需要往前看: ${result.stats.needLookback}`);\\n  console.log(`  需要完整阅读(≥10条): ${result.stats.needFullRead}`);\\n  console.log(`  有产品选择: ${result.stats.hasProductSelection}`);\\n  console.log(`  有地址信息: ${result.stats.hasAddress}`);\\n  console.log(`  有问题标记: ${result.stats.hasIssues}`);\\n  console.log(`  沉默超90天: ${result.stats.silentOver90Days}`);\\n  console.log(`  沉默超30天: ${result.stats.silentOver30Days}`);\\n\\n  if (result.stats.hasIssues > 0) {\\n    const issueList = result.customers.filter((c) => c._issues.length > 0);\\n    console.log(`\\\\n标记有问题的客户（前10）:`);\\n    for (const c of issueList.slice(0, 10)) {\\n      console.log(`  - ${c.name}: ${c._issues.join('; ')}`);\\n    }\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nmain();\\n\"}"</parameters>

/port/i, /airport/i, /seaport/i, /via /, /to /,\\n];\\n\\n// ====== 工具函数 ======\\n\\nfunction isSystemMessage(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return false;\\n  if 'send') sent++;\\n    else if (msg.side === 'received' || msg.latestMessageType === 'received') received++;\\n  }\\n  const total = sent + received;\\n  return {\\n    total,\\n    sent,\\n  return [];\\n}\\n\\nfunction processCustomer(customer) {\\n  const entry = { ...customer };\\n  const flags = {};\\n  const issues = [];\\n\\n  const rawMsg = entry.latestMessageContent || '';\\n  const isSys = isSystemMessage(rawMsg);\\n\\n  // 1. 系统消息检测\\n  flags.isLatestSystemMsg = isSys;\\n  if (isSys) {\\n    issues.push('latestMessageContent 是系统消息');\\n    // 尝试从消息列表中找真实消息\\n    if // 3. 消息数统计\\n  const msgCount = entry.messageCount || (Array.isArray(entry.messages) ? entry.messages.length : 0);\\n  entry._computedMessageCount = msgCount;\\n  if (msgCount >= 10) {\\n    flags.needFullRead = true;\\n    issues.push(`消息数 ${msgCount} ≥ 10，必须逐条读取`);\\n  }\\n\\n  // 4. 产品代码扫描\\n  const scanTargets = [effectiveMsg];\\n  if (Array.isArray(entry.messages)) {\\n    for (const candidates.push({ file: f, mtime: stat.mtimeMs, priority: 5 });\\n        }\\n      }\\n    } catch (_) { /* skip */ }\\n  }\\n\\n  candidates.sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority || b.mtime - process.exit(1);\\n    }\\n    inputFile = path.join(DATA_DIR, latest);\\n  }\\n\\n  if (!fs.existsSync(inputFile)) {\\n    console.error(`文件不存在: ${inputFile}`);\\n    process.exit(1);\\n  }\\n\\n <observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>阶段 0 数据预处理脚本 preprocess_cdp.js 已实现</title>
  <subtitle>实现了 DESIGN.md 阶段 0 所有 7 项预处理功能，含自动输入发现和统计输出</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>创建了 scripts/preprocess_cdp.js（约 250 行），实现 DESIGN.md 阶段 0 全部功能</fact>
    <fact>系统消息检测：14 个匹配模式（中英文双语），isSystemMessage() 函数，自动从消息列表中往前找第一条真实消息替换</fact>
    <fact>表情/单字检测：Unicode Emoji 全覆盖（U+1F000-U+1FFFF、U+2600-U+27BF 等 8 个范围），外加英文单字列表（ok/yes/no/hi 等），标记 needLookback</fact>
    <fact>消息数统计：自动计算 messageCount 或 messages 数组长度，≥10 条标记 needFullRead</fact>
    <fact>产品代码扫描：正则 (CO|PO|BO|SO|MO|SKU)[-_\\s]?\d{2,4} 匹配，收集所有产品代码到 _productCodes 数组</fact>
    <fact>地址关键词扫描：30+ 关键词覆盖地址通用词、非洲/中东/拉美主要国家和城市名，标记 hasAddress</fact>
    <fact>沉默天数计算：支持 Unix 毫秒时间戳和 ISO 日期字符串两种格式，当前时间减最后联系时间</fact>
    <fact>消息方向统计：统计 sent/received 比例，支持 messages 数组和 latestMessageType 两种数据源</fact>
    <fact>自动输入发现：优先全量客户分类文件（priority=10），其次 extracted_ 文件（priority=5），按 mtime 取最新</fact>
    <fact>输出格式：cleaned_<timestamp>.json，含 processedAt/source/stats/customers 顶层结构</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>阶段 0 预处理脚本是五阶段流水线的第一个脚本，现已完整实现。脚本对输入数据进行 7 个维度的处理：系统消息检测与替换、表情/单字 lookback 标记、消息数统计与完整阅读标记、产品代码扫描、地址关键词扫描、沉默天数计算、消息方向统计。脚本采用不可变数据处理模式（扩展运算符创建新对象），所有新增字段使用 _ 前缀命名约定（_flags、_issues、_silenceDays 等）与原始数据区分。CLI 支持自动发现最新输入文件（优先全量分类文件），也可通过命令行参数指定输入。输出包含详细统计（含系统消息数、needFullRead 数、沉默超 90 天客户数等）和问题客户列表。</narrative>

  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"d:\\\\ClaudeWorkspace\\\\08_客户跟进\\\\Okki\\\\scripts\\\\preprocess_cdp.js\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * 阶段0：数据预处理脚本\\n * 输入：data/extracted_*.json 或 data/*全量客户分类.json（CDP 抓取原始数据）\\n * 输出：data/cleaned_<timestamp>.json\\n *\\n * 处理内容：\\n * - 检测 latestMessageContent 是否系统消息 → 标记并尝试替换\\n * - 检测最后消息是否表情/单字 → 标记 needLookback\\n * - 统计消息数 → 标记 needFullRead（≥10 条）\\n * - 正则扫描产品代码和地址关键词 → 标记 hasProductSelection / hasAddress\\n * - 计算沉默天数\\n * - 统计消息方向（如有消息列表数据）\\n */\\n\\nconst fs = require('fs');\\nconst path = require('path');\\n\\nconst DATA_DIR = path.join(__dirname, '..', 'data');\\n\\n// ====== 系统消息模式（来自 business-rules.md） ======\\nconst SYSTEM_MSG_PATTERNS = [\\n  /automatic reception will no longer intervene/i,\\n  /自动接待将不再触发/,\\n  /Marco大模型翻译/,\\n  /阿里国际Marco大模型翻译/,\\n  /买家有流失风险/,\\n  /Buyer has churn risk/,\\n  /一旦离开平台发生纠纷或欺诈/,\\n  /由于您介入该会话/,\\n  /Due to your intervention in this session/,\\n  /AI给您生成了一条回复建议/,\\n  /反馈/,\\n  /You have a visitor\\\\. Follow up with them as soon as possible\\\\./i,\\n  /This buyer has been pre-screened and has a clear request/i,\\n  /Since you have read the conversation/i,\\n];\\n\\n// ====== 表情/单字模式 ======\\nconst EMOJI_SINGLE_PATTERNS = [\\n  /^[\\\\u{1F000}-\\\\u{1FFFF}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{2600}-\\\\u{27BF}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{FE00}-\\\\u{FEFF}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{2702}-\\\\u{27B0}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{1F600}-\\\\u{1F64F}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{1F300}-\\\\u{1F5FF}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{1F680}-\\\\u{1F6FF}]+$/u,\\n  /^[\\\\u{1F900}-\\\\u{1F9FF}]+$/u,\\n  /^(ok|okay|yes|no|hi|hello|hey|thanks|thx|ty|bye|good|nice|wow)$/i,\\n  /^[\\\\u{1F600}-\\\\u{1FAFF}\\\\u{2600}-\\\\u{27BF}\\\\u{1F300}-\\\\u{1F5FF}\\\\u{1F680}-\\\\u{1F6FF}\\\\u{1F900}-\\\\u{1F9FF}\\\\u{2700}-\\\\u{27BF}]+$/u,\\n  /^\\\\[图片\\\\]$/, /^\\\\[商品\\\\]$/, /^\\\\[表情\\\\]$/,\\n];\\n\\n// ====== 产品代码模式 ======\\nconst PRODUCT_CODE_RE = /(?:CO|PO|BO|SO|MO|SKU)[-_\\\\s]?\\\\d{2,4}/gi;\\n\\n// ====== 地址关键词 ======\\nconst ADDRESS_KEYWORDS = [\\n  /address/i, /shipping/i, /delivery/i, /地址/, /收货/, /运送/,\\n  /street/i, /city/i, /country/i, /zip/i, /postal/i,\\n  /cameroon/i, /nigeria/i, /kenya/i, /ghana/i, /tanzania/i, /uganda/i, /zambia/i,\\n  /saudi/i, /uae/i, /dubai/i, /egypt/i, /sudan/i, /morocco/i, /algeria/i,\\n  /colombia/i, /brazil/i, /mexico/i, /peru/i, /chile/i,\\n  /cotonou/i, /lagos/i, /nairobi/i, /doha/i, /riyadh/i, /jeddah/i,\\n  /port/i, /airport/i, /seaport/i, /via /, /to /,\\n];\\n\\n// ====== 工具函数 ======\\n\\nfunction isSystemMessage(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return false;\\n  if (text.trim().length === 0) return false;\\n  return SYSTEM_MSG_PATTERNS.some((p) => p.test(text));\\n}\\n\\nfunction isEmojiOrSingleWord(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return false;\\n  const trimmed = text.trim();\\n  if (trimmed.length === 0) return true;\\n  if (trimmed.length <= 3) return true;\\n  return EMOJI_SINGLE_PATTERNS.some((p) => p.test(trimmed));\\n}\\n\\nfunction scanProductCodes(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return [];\\n  const matches = text.match(PRODUCT_CODE_RE) || [];\\n  return [...new Set(matches.map((m) => m.toUpperCase()))];\\n}\\n\\nfunction scanAddressKeywords(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return false;\\n  return ADDRESS_KEYWORDS.some((re) => re.test(text));\\n}\\n\\nfunction calcSilenceDays(lastContactTime) {\\n  if (!lastContactTime) return 999;\\n  const now = Date.now();\\n  const ts = typeof lastContactTime === 'number' ? lastContactTime : new Date(lastContactTime).getTime();\\n  if (isNaN(ts)) return 999;\\n  return Math.floor((now - ts) / 86400000);\\n}\\n\\nfunction calcMessageDirection(messages) {\\n  if (!Array.isArray(messages) || messages.length === 0) return null;\\n  let sent = 0;\\n  let received = 0;\\n  for (const msg of messages) {\\n    if (msg.side === 'sent' || msg.latestMessageType === 'send') sent++;\\n    else if (msg.side === 'received' || msg.latestMessageType === 'received') received++;\\n  }\\n  const total = sent + received;\\n  return {\\n    total,\\n    sent,\\n    received,\\n    ratioFromUs: total > 0 ? (sent / total) : 0,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\nfunction findLatestRealMessage(messages) {\\n  if (!Array.isArray(messages)) return null;\\n  for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\\n    const msg = messages[i];\\n    const text = msg.text || msg.latestMessageContent || '';\\n    if (!isSystemMessage(text)) return msg;\\n  }\\n  return null;\\n}\\n\\n// ====== 主处理函数 ======\\n\\nfunction getCustomersFromData(data) {\\n  if (Array.isArray(data)) return data;\\n  if (data.customers) return data.customers;\\n  if (data.p0p1) return data.p0p1;\\n  if (data.results) return data.results;\\n  return [];\\n}\\n\\nfunction processCustomer(customer) {\\n  const entry = { ...customer };\\n  const flags = {};\\n  const issues = [];\\n\\n  const rawMsg = entry.latestMessageContent || '';\\n  const isSys = isSystemMessage(rawMsg);\\n\\n  // 1. 系统消息检测\\n  flags.isLatestSystemMsg = isSys;\\n  if (isSys) {\\n    issues.push('latestMessageContent 是系统消息');\\n    // 尝试从消息列表中找真实消息\\n    if (Array.isArray(entry.messages)) {\\n      const real = findLatestRealMessage(entry.messages);\\n      if (real) {\\n        entry._replacedMessageContent = real.text || real.latestMessageContent || '';\\n        entry._replacedFromIndex = entry.messages.indexOf(real);\\n        flags.latestMsgReplaced = true;\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // 2. 表情/单字检测\\n  const effectiveMsg = flags.latestMsgReplaced ? entry._replacedMessageContent : rawMsg;\\n  if (isEmojiOrSingleWord(effectiveMsg)) {\\n    flags.needLookback = true;\\n    issues.push('最后一条有效消息是表情/单字，需往前看');\\n  }\\n\\n  // 3. 消息数统计\\n  const msgCount = entry.messageCount || (Array.isArray(entry.messages) ? entry.messages.length : 0);\\n  entry._computedMessageCount = msgCount;\\n  if (msgCount >= 10) {\\n    flags.needFullRead = true;\\n    issues.push(`消息数 ${msgCount} ≥ 10，必须逐条读取`);\\n  }\\n\\n  // 4. 产品代码扫描\\n  const scanTargets = [effectiveMsg];\\n  if (Array.isArray(entry.messages)) {\\n    for (const m of entry.messages) {\\n      scanTargets.push(m.text || '');\\n    }\\n  }\\n  const allCodes = [];\\n  for (const t of scanTargets) {\\n    allCodes.push(...scanProductCodes(t));\\n  }\\n  const uniqueCodes = [...new Set(allCodes)];\\n  if (uniqueCodes.length > 0) {\\n    flags.hasProductSelection = true;\\n    entry._productCodes = uniqueCodes;\\n  }\\n\\n  // 5. 地址关键词扫描\\n  if (scanAddressKeywords(effectiveMsg) || (Array.isArray(entry.messages) && entry.messages.some((m) => scanAddressKeywords(m.text || '')))) {\\n    flags.hasAddress = true;\\n  }\\n\\n  // 6. 沉默天数\\n  const lastTime = entry.lastContactTime || entry.latestMessageTime;\\n  const silenceDays = calcSilenceDays(lastTime);\\n  entry._silenceDays = silenceDays;\\n\\n  // 7. 消息方向\\n  if (Array.isArray(entry.messages)) {\\n    const dir = calcMessageDirection(entry.messages);\\n    if (dir) {\\n      entry._messageDirection = dir;\\n    }\\n  } else if (entry.latestMessageType) {\\n    entry._messageDirection = {\\n      total: msgCount || 1,\\n      latestDirection: entry.latestMessageType,\\n    };\\n  }\\n\\n  // 8. 合并标记\\n  entry._flags = flags;\\n  entry._issues = issues;\\n\\n  return entry;\\n}\\n\\nfunction processAll(data) {\\n  const customers = getCustomersFromData(data);\\n  const cleaned = customers.map(processCustomer);\\n\\n  const stats = {\\n    total: cleaned.length,\\n    systemMsgDetected: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.isLatestSystemMsg).length,\\n    needLookback: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.needLookback).length,\\n    needFullRead: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.needFullRead).length,\\n    hasProductSelection: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.hasProductSelection).length,\\n    hasAddress: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.hasAddress).length,\\n    hasIssues: cleaned.filter((c) => c._issues.length > 0).length,\\n    silentOver90Days: cleaned.filter((c) => c._silenceDays > 90).length,\\n    silentOver30Days: cleaned.filter((c) => c._silenceDays > 30).length,\\n  };\\n\\n  return {\\n    processedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\\n    source: data.capturedAt || data.scrapedAt || 'unknown',\\n    stats,\\n    customers: cleaned,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n// ====== CLI入口 ======\\n\\nfunction findLatestInput() {\\n  const files = fs.readdirSync(DATA_DIR).filter((f) => f.endsWith('.json'));\\n  const candidates = [];\\n\\n  for (const f of files) {\\n    const fullPath = path.join(DATA_DIR, f);\\n    try {\\n      const stat = fs.statSync(fullPath);\\n      if (stat.size > 1000) {\\n        // 优先全量客户分类，其次 extracted\\n        if (f.includes('全量客户分类')) {\\n          candidates.push({ file: f, mtime: stat.mtimeMs, priority: 10 });\\n        } else if (f.startsWith('extracted_')) {\\n          candidates.push({ file: f, mtime: stat.mtimeMs, priority: 5 });\\n        }\\n      }\\n    } catch (_) { /* skip */ }\\n  }\\n\\n  candidates.sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority || b.mtime - a.mtime);\\n  return candidates[0]?.file || null;\\n}\\n\\nfunction main() {\\n  const inputArg = process.argv[2];\\n  let inputFile;\\n\\n  if (inputArg) {\\n    inputFile = path.resolve(inputArg);\\n  } else {\\n    const latest = findLatestInput();\\n    if (!latest) {\\n      console.error('未找到输入数据文件。请指定文件路径：node preprocess_cdp.js <data-file>');\\n      process.exit(1);\\n    }\\n    inputFile = path.join(DATA_DIR, latest);\\n  }\\n\\n  if (!fs.existsSync(inputFile)) {\\n    console.error(`文件不存在: ${inputFile}`);\\n    process.exit(1);\\n  }\\n\\n  console.log(`读取: ${path.basename(inputFile)}`);\\n  const raw = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(inputFile, 'utf-8'));\\n  const result = processAll(raw);\\n\\n  const ts = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-').slice(0, 19);\\n  const outFile = path.join(DATA_DIR, `cleaned_${ts}.json`);\\n  fs.writeFileSync(outFile, JSON.stringify(result, null, 2), 'utf-8');\\n\\n  console.log(`输出: ${path.basename(outFile)}`);\\n  console.log(`统计: ${result.stats.total} 个客户`);\\n  console.log(`  系统消息检测: ${result.stats.systemMsgDetected}`);\\n  console.log(`  需要往前看: ${result.stats.needLookback}`);\\n  console.log(`  需要完整阅读(≥10条): ${result.stats.needFullRead}`);\\n  console.log(`  有产品选择: ${result.stats.hasProductSelection}`);\\n  console.log(`  有地址信息: ${result.stats.hasAddress}`);\\n  console.log(`  有问题标记: ${result.stats.hasIssues}`);\\n  console.log(`  沉默超90天: ${result.stats.silentOver90Days}`);\\n  console.log(`  沉默超30天: ${result.stats.silentOver30Days}`);\\n\\n  if (result.stats.hasIssues > 0) {\\n    const issueList = result.customers.filter((c) => c._issues.length > 0);\\n    console.log(`\\\\n标记有问题的客户（前10）:`);\\n    for (const c of issueList.slice(0, 10)) {\\n      console.log(`  - ${c.name}: ${c._issues.join('; ')}`);\\n    }\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nmain();\\n\"}"</parameters>

issues;\\n\\n  return entry;\\n}\\n\\nfunction processAll(data) {\\n  const customers = getCustomersFromData(data);\\n  const cleaned = customers.map(processCustomer);\\n\\n  const stats = {\\n    total: cleaned.length,\\n    systemMsgDetected: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.isLatestSystemMsg).length,\\n    needLookback: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.needLookback).length,\\n    needFullRead: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.needFullRead).length,\\n    hasProductSelection: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.hasProductSelection).length,\\n    hasAddress: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.hasAddress).length,\\n    hasIssues: cleaned.filter((c) => c._issues.length > 0).length,\\n    silentOver90Days: cleaned.filter((c) => c._silenceDays > 90).length,\\n    silentOver30Days: cleaned.filter((c) => c._silenceDays > 30).length,\\n  };\\n\\n  return {\\n    processedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\\n    source: data.capturedAt || data.scrapedAt || 'unknown',\\n    stats,\\n    customers: cleaned,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n// ====== CLI入口 ======\\n\\nfunction findLatestInput() {\\n  const files = fs.readdirSync(DATA_DIR).filter((f) => f.endsWith('.json'));\\n  const candidates = [];\\n\\n  for (const f of files) {\\n    const fullPath = path.join(DATA_DIR, f);\\n    try {\\n      const stat = fs.statSync(fullPath);\\n      if (stat.size > 1000) {\\n        // 优先全量客户分类，其次 extracted\\n        if (f.includes('全量客户分类')) {\\n          candidates.push({ file: f, mtime: stat.mtimeMs, priority: 10 });\\n        } else if (f.startsWith('extracted_')) {\\n          candidates.push({ file: f, mtime: stat.mtimeMs, priority: 5 });\\n        }\\n      }\\n    } catch (_) { /* skip */ }\\n  }\\n\\n  candidates.sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority || b.mtime - a.mtime);\\n  return candidates[0]?.file || null;\\n}\\n\\nfunction main() {\\n  const inputArg = process.argv[2];\\n  let inputFile;\\n\\n  if (inputArg) {\\n    inputFile = path.resolve(inputArg);\\n  } else {\\n    const latest = findLatestInput();\\n    if (!latest) {\\n      console.error('未找到输入数据文件。请指定文件路径：node preprocess_cdp.js <data-file>');\\n      process.exit(1);\\n    }\\n    inputFile = path.join(DATA_DIR, latest);\\n  }\\n\\n  if (!fs.existsSync(inputFile)) {\\n    console.error(`文件不存在: ${inputFile}`);\\n    process.exit(1);\\n  }\\n\\n  console.log(`读取: ${path.basename(inputFile)}`);\\n  const raw = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(inputFile, 'utf-8'));\\n  const result = processAll(raw);\\n\\n  const ts = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-').slice(0, 19);\\n  const outFile = path.join(DATA_DIR, `cleaned_${ts}.json`);\\n  fs.writeFileSync(outFile, JSON.stringify(result, null, 2), 'utf-8');\\n\\n  console.log(`输出: ${path.basename(outFile)}`);\\n  console.log(`统计: ${result.stats.total} 个客户`);\\n  console.log(`  系统消息检测: ${result.stats.systemMsgDetected}`);\\n  console.log(`  需要往前看: ${result.stats.needLookback}`);\\n  console.log(`  需要完整阅读(≥10条): ${result.stats.needFullRead}`);\\n  console.log(`  有产品选择: ${result.stats.hasProductSelection}`);\\n  console.log(`  有地址信息: ${result.stats.hasAddress}`);\\n  console.log(`  有问题标记: ${result.stats.hasIssues}`);\\n  console.log(`  沉默超90天: ${result.stats.silentOver90Days}`);\\n  console.log(`  沉默超30天: ${result.stats.silentOver30Days}`);\\n\\n  if (result.stats.hasIssues > 0) {\\n    const issueList = result.customers.filter((c) => c._issues.length > 0);\\n    console.log(`\\\\n标记有问题的客户（前10）:`);\\n    for (const c of issueList.slice(0, 10)) {\\n      console.log(`  - ${c.name}: ${c._issues.join('; ')}`);\\n    }\\n content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>预处理脚本首次运行成功：432 客户中 62 条系统消息污染、7 条需往前看、127 人沉默超 90 天</title>
  <subtitle>preprocess_cdp.js 在 2026-05-03 全量分类数据上运行，暴露关键数据质量问题</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>预处理脚本首次成功运行，输入为 2026-05-03T01-19-12_全量客户分类.json（432 客户），输出 cleaned_2026-05-04T07-46-39.json</fact>
    <fact>62 个客户的 latestMessageContent 为系统消息（14.4%），包括 Aka-Mwau Esme、Hakim Ezat、Israa Fawzi、Abdulrhman alal、Claudia Mersilus、Aldane Elister、Talosh talosh 等</fact>
    <fact>7 个客户最后有效消息为表情/单字，需往前看：SONIYA PAUL、Aloh Voma、Asma Noor</fact>
    <fact>needFullRead 为 0：全量分类数据不含 messages 数组，无法统计消息数——这是数据结构限制，非脚本 bug</fact>
    <fact>仅 1 个客户有产品代码匹配（CO/PO/BO 等模式），说明产品代码扫描对当前数据格式效果有限</fact>
    <fact>93 个客户（21.5%）对话中含地址关键词，可作为升级信号</fact>
    <fact>127 人沉默超 90 天（29.4%），278 人沉默超 30 天（64.4%）</fact>
    <fact>69 个客户被标记有问题，其中 62 条系统消息 + 7 条表情/单字</fact>
    <fact>全量分类数据缺少 messages 数组是结构性问题——仅 deep_scrape 类数据才有完整消息列表，这影响阶段 0 的消息方向和消息数统计精度</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>预处理脚本首次运行结果既有惊喜也有局限。惊喜在于：62 条系统消息污染被成功检出——这说明 DESIGN.md 阶段 0 的质量保障第一关正在发挥作用，如果不做预处理，这 62 个客户的 latestMessageContent 可能会误导后续 AI 分类。局限在于：全量客户分类数据（API 拉取）不包含 messages 数组，只有 latestMessageContent 和 lastContactTime 等元数据字段，因此消息数统计、消息方向统计、产品代码深层扫描等功能在该数据格式下无法全效运作。这暴露了一个设计假设：DESIGN.md 阶段 0 假设输入数据可能有 messages 数组，但实际全量 API 数据可能没有。对于没有 messages 数组的客户，needFullRead 为 0 是正常结果——这些客户需要后续深抓（阶段 3）时获取完整对话。</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
  </concepts>

  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"d:\\\\ClaudeWorkspace\\\\08_客户跟进\\\\Okki\\\\scripts\\\\classify_rules.js\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * 阶段1：规则引擎预分类\\n * 输入：data/cleaned_*.json（阶段0输出）\\n * 输出：data/classified_rules_<timestamp>.json\\n *\\n * 确定性规则（不依赖 AI）：\\n * - 纯系统消息 + 无实质对话 → P4\\n * - 我方发送 + 客户从未回复 + 超30天 → P4\\n * - 沉默超90天 + 无有效互动 → P3\\n * - 沉默超30天 + messageCount ≤ 3 → P3\\n * - 未读消息 + 客户最近发送 → P0/P1（待AI细分）\\n * - 规则覆盖不了的 → 标记 needAI: true\\n *\\n * 规则引擎只做确定判断，不确定的不猜，扔给 AI。\\n */\\n\\nconst fs = require('fs');\\nconst path = require('path');\\n\\nconst DATA_DIR = path.join(__dirname, '..', 'data');\\n\\n// ====== 优先级定义 ======\\nconst PRIORITY = {\\n  P0_PAYMENT: 'P0-付款/售后',\\n  P0_INTENT: 'P0-高意向',\\n  P1: 'P1',\\n  P2: 'P2',\\n  P3: 'P3',\\n  P4: 'P4',\\n};\\n\\n// ====== 升级信号关键词 ======\\nconst UPGRADE_SIGNALS = [\\n  { re: /下单|place\\\\s*order|make\\\\s*order|send\\\\s*order|confirm\\\\s*order/i, label: '下单信号' },\\n  { re: /PI|proforma\\\\s*invoice|形式发票|发票.*已发|invoice.*sent/i, label: 'PI相关' },\\n  { re: /付款|payment|deposit|depósito|预付|TT|bank\\\\s*transfer/i, label: '付款相关' },\\n  { re: /样品|sample|muestra|échantillon|عينة/i, label: '样品阶段' },\\n  { re: /地址.*已|address.*confirm|ship.*address|delivery.*address/i, label: '地址确认' },\\n  { re: /partner|合伙|商量|discuss.*partner|conversation.*boss/i, label: '合伙商量' },\\n  { re: /运费|shipping\\\\s*cost|freight|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW/i, label: '运费讨论' },\\n  { re: /价格|price|pricing|quote|quotation|cotización|precio/i, label: '价格讨论' },\\n  { re: /选.*款|select.*style|choose.*design|pick.*item/i, label: '选款' },\\n  { re: /数量|quantity|pcs|pieces|units|qty/i, label: '数量讨论' },\\n];\\n\\n// ====== 降级信号关键词 ======\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = [\\n  { re: /not\\\\s*interested|不感兴趣|no\\\\s*thanks/i, label: '不感兴趣' },\\n  { re: /店铺.*转让|sell.*shop|转让|transfer.*business/i, label: '非采购意图' },\\n];\\n\\n// ====== 工具函数 ======\\n\\nfunction hasUpgradeSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return [];\\n  return UPGRADE_SIGNALS.filter((s) => s.re.test(text)).map((s) => s.label);\\n}\\n\\nfunction hasDowngradeSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return [];\\n  return DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS.filter((s) => s.re.test(text)).map((s) => s.label);\\n}\\n\\nfunction isPureSystemMessages(entry) {\\n  const flags = entry._flags || {};\\n  if (!flags.isLatestSystemMsg) return false;\\n  const msgCount = entry._computedMessageCount || 0;\\n  if (msgCount <= 1) return true;\\n  if (Array.isArray(entry.messages) && entry.messages.every((m) => {\\n    const text = m.text || m.latestMessageContent || '';\\n    return text.trim().length === 0 || /^(自动接待|Marco|AI给您|反馈|Since you have)/.test(text);\\n  })) return true;\\n  return false;\\n}\\n\\nfunction isValidInteraction(entry) {\\n  const msg = entry.latestMessageContent || '';\\n  if (!msg || msg.trim().length === 0) return false;\\n  if (entry._flags?.isLatestSystemMsg && entry._computedMessageCount <= 1) return false;\\n  if (msg === '[图片]' || msg === '[商品]' || msg === '[表情]') return true;\\n  if (msg.length < 2) return false;\\n  return true;\\n}\\n\\nfunction customerNeverReplied(entry) {\\n  if (entry._messageDirection) {\\n    const dir = entry._messageDirection;\\n    if (dir.received === 0 && dir.sent > 0) return true;\\n  }\\n  if (entry.latestMessageType === 'send' && !entry.msgFromCustomer) return true;\\n  return false;\\n}\\n\\n// ====== 主分类逻辑 ======\\n\\nfunction classifyCustomer(entry) {\\n  const silenceDays = entry._silenceDays || 999;\\n  const msgCount = entry._computedMessageCount || 0;\\n  const flags = entry._flags || {};\\n  const issues = entry._issues || [];\\n  const reason = [];\\n  const priority = { level: null, subType: null, confidence: 'deterministic' };\\n\\n  const effectiveMsg = flags.latestMsgReplaced ? (entry._replacedMessageContent || '') : (entry.latestMessageContent || '');\\n  const isUnread = entry.isUnread || entry.unreadCount > 0;\\n  const msgType = entry.latestMessageType;\\n\\n  // Rule 1: 纯系统消息 + 无实质对话 → P4\\n  if (isPureSystemMessages(entry)) {\\n    priority.level = 'P4';\\n    reason.push('纯系统消息，无实质对话');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 2: 我方发送 + 客户从未回复 + 超30天 → P4\\n  if (customerNeverReplied(entry) && silenceDays > 30) {\\n    priority.level = 'P4';\\n    reason.push('我方单向发送，客户从未回复，超30天');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 3: 沉默超90天 + 无有效互动 → P3\\n  if (silenceDays > 90 && !isValidInteraction(entry)) {\\n    priority.level = 'P3';\\n    reason.push('沉默超90天，无有效互动');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 4: 沉默超90天 + 有互动但无近期活跃 → P3\\n  if (silenceDays > 90 && msgCount <= 3) {\\n    priority.level = 'P3';\\n    reason.push('沉默超90天，消息≤3条');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 5: 沉默超30天 + 消息≤3条 + 非未读 → P3\\n  if (silenceDays > 30 && msgCount <= 3 && !isUnread) {\\n    priority.level = 'P3';\\n    reason.push('沉默超30天，消息≤3条，非未读');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 6: 非采购意图 → P4\\n  const downgrade = hasDowngradeSignals(effectiveMsg);\\n  if (downgrade.length > 0 && !isUnread) {\\n    priority.level = 'P4';\\n    reason.push(`降级信号: ${downgrade.join(', ')}`);\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 7: 30天内无互动 + 消息数≤10 → P3 (rule-based P3 fallback)\\n  if (silenceDays > 30 && msgCount <= 10 && !isUnread) {\\n    priority.level = 'P3';\\n    reason.push('30天+无互动，消息少');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 8: 30天内无互动 → P2/P3 边界 → needAI\\n  if (silenceDays > 30 && !isUnread) {\\n    priority.level = 'P2';\\n    reason.push('30天内无互动（需AI确认是否降为P3）');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 9: 未读消息 + 客户发送 → P0/P1 (待AI细分)\\n  if (isUnread && msgType === 'received') {\\n    const signals = hasUpgradeSignals(effectiveMsg);\\n    if (signals.some((s) => s.includes('下单') || s.includes('PI') || s.includes('付款') || s.includes('地址确认'))) {\\n      priority.level = 'P0';\\n      priority.subType = '高意向';\\n      reason.push('未读+客户消息+升级信号');\\n      return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n    }\\n    priority.level = 'P1';\\n    reason.push('未读消息，客户发送（需AI细分P0/P1）');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 10: 未读消息 + 我方发送 → P1\\n  if (isUnread && msgType === 'send') {\\n    priority.level = 'P1';\\n    reason.push('未读消息，我方发送（需AI确认）');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 11: 有升级信号 + 近期活跃(≤7天) → P0/P1 (待AI细分)\\n  const signals = hasUpgradeSignals(effectiveMsg);\\n  if (signals.length > 0 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    if (signals.some((s) => s.includes('下单') || s.includes('PI') || s.includes('付款'))) {\\n      priority.level = 'P0';\\n      priority.subType = '待确认';\\n      reason.push(`强升级信号+7天内活跃: ${signals.slice(0, 3).join(', ')}`);\\n      return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n    }\\n    priority.level = 'P1';\\n    reason.push(`升级信号+7天内活跃: ${signals.slice(0, 3).join(', ')}`);\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 12: 近期活跃(≤14天) → P2\\n  if (silenceDays <= 14) {\\n    priority.level = 'P2';\\n    reason.push('14天内活跃');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 13: 有互动但在普通范围 → P2, needAI\\n  if (silenceDays <= 30) {\\n    priority.level = 'P2';\\n    reason.push('30天内互动过');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Fallback: needAI\\n  priority.level = 'P2';\\n  reason.push('规则覆盖不全，需AI判断');\\n  return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n}\\n\\n// ====== 主处理 ======\\n\\nfunction processAll(data) {\\n  const customers = data.customers || [];\\n  const classified = customers.map((c) => {\\n    const result = classifyCustomer(c);\\n    return {\\n      ...c,\\n      _rulePriority: result.level,\\n      _ruleSubType: result.subType || null,\\n      _ruleReasons: result.reasons,\\n      _needAI: result.needAI,\\n      _ruleConfidence: result.confidence || 'deterministic',\\n    };\\n  });\\n\\n  const stats = {\\n    total: classified.length,\\n    byPriority: {},\\n    needAI: classified.filter((c) => c._needAI).length,\\n    deterministic: classified.filter((c) => !c._needAI).length,\\n  };\\n\\n  for (const c of classified) {\\n    stats.byPriority[c._rulePriority] = (stats.byPriority[c._rulePriority] || 0) + 1;\\n  }\\n\\n  return {\\n    classifiedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\\n    source: data.processedAt content.thinking: The classify_rules.js script has been written and is being tested. Let me create an observation for this implementation.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>阶段 1 规则引擎预分类脚本 classify_rules.js 已实现</title>
  <subtitle>实现了 13 条确定性规则，含 10 个升级信号和 2 个降级信号检测，自动区分 AI 所需与确定性</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>创建了 scripts/classify_rules.js（约 250 行），实现 DESIGN.md 阶段 1 全部确定性分类规则</fact>
    <fact>13 条分类规则按优先级顺序执行：Rule1 纯系统消息→P4、Rule2 单向未回复→P4、Rule3-5 沉默超90天→P3、Rule6 非采购意图→P4、Rule7 30天+沉默→P3、Rule8 30天边界→needAI、Rule9-10 未读消息→P0/P1 needAI、Rule11 升级信号+活跃→P0/P1 needAI、Rule12-13 近期活跃→P2 needAI</fact>
    <fact>10 个升级信号关键词覆盖中英西法阿多语言：下单/PI/付款/样品/地址确认/合伙商量/运费/价格/选款/数量</fact>
    <fact>2 个降级信号：不感兴趣(not interested)、非采购意图(店铺转让/sell shop)</fact>
    <fact>每个客户输出 5 个规则字段：_rulePriority（P0-P4）、_ruleSubType（付款/售后/高意向等）、_ruleReasons（理由数组）、_needAI（是否需AI判断）、_ruleConfidence（deterministic/needAI）</fact>
    <fact>isPureSystemMessages() 函数综合判断：_flags.isLatestSystemMsg + _computedMessageCount ≤ 1 + messages 数组全系统消息检测</fact>
    <fact>customerNeverReplied() 函数综合判断：_messageDirection.received === 0 + latestMessageType === 'send' + msgFromCustomer 为空</fact>
    <fact>脚本自动查找最新 cleaned_*.json 作为输入，通过命令行参数也可指定文件</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>阶段 1 规则引擎是五阶段流水线的第二个脚本，现已完整实现。核心设计哲学是"只做确定判断，不确定的不猜，扔给 AI"——13 条规则中 7 条输出确定性分类（needAI: false），6 条输出带标记的 AI 所需分类（needAI: true）。规则使用阶段 0 预处理的 _flags、_silenceDays、_computedMessageCount 等字段，结合升级/降级信号检测，实现从系统消息到未读消息的全覆盖。特别值得注意的是 Rule 8（30天边界）和 Rule 9（未读+客户消息）将边界案例标记为 needAI——这些是 AI 两遍法（阶段 2）的价值所在，规则引擎不过度猜测。</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_modified>
    <file>d:\ClaudeWorkspace\08_客户跟进\Okki\scripts\classify_rules.js</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"d:\\\\ClaudeWorkspace\\\\08_客户跟进\\\\Okki\\\\scripts\\\\classify_rules.js\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * 阶段1：规则引擎预分类\\n * 输入：data/cleaned_*.json（阶段0输出）\\n * 输出：data/classified_rules_<timestamp>.json\\n *\\n * 确定性规则（不依赖 AI）：\\n * - 纯系统消息 + 无实质对话 → P4\\n * - 我方发送 + 客户从未回复 + 超30天 → P4\\n * - 沉默超90天 + 无有效互动 → P3\\n * - 沉默超30天 + messageCount ≤ 3 → P3\\n * - 未读消息 + 客户最近发送 → P0/P1（待AI细分）\\n * - 规则覆盖不了的 → 标记 needAI: true\\n *\\n * 规则引擎只做确定判断，不确定的不猜，扔给 AI。\\n */\\n\\nconst fs = require('fs');\\nconst path = require('path');\\n\\nconst DATA_DIR = path.join(__dirname, '..', 'data');\\n\\n// ====== 优先级定义 ======\\nconst PRIORITY = {\\n  P0_PAYMENT: 'P0-付款/售后',\\n  P0_INTENT: 'P0-高意向',\\n  P1: 'P1',\\n  P2: 'P2',\\n  P3: 'P3',\\n  P4: 'P4',\\n};\\n\\n// ====== 升级信号关键词 ======\\nconst UPGRADE_SIGNALS = [\\n  { re: /下单|place\\\\s*order|make\\\\s*order|send\\\\s*order|confirm\\\\s*order/i, label: '下单信号' },\\n  { re: /PI|proforma\\\\s*invoice|形式发票|发票.*已发|invoice.*sent/i, label: 'PI相关' },\\n  { re: /付款|payment|deposit|depósito|预付|TT|bank\\\\s*transfer/i, label: '付款相关' },\\n  { re: /样品|sample|muestra|échantillon|عينة/i, label: '样品阶段' },\\n  { re: /地址.*已|address.*confirm|ship.*address|delivery.*address/i, label: '地址确认' },\\n  { re: /partner|合伙|商量|discuss.*partner|conversation.*boss/i, label: '合伙商量' },\\n  { re: /运费|shipping\\\\s*cost|freight|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW/i, label: '运费讨论' },\\n  { re: /价格|price|pricing|quote|quotation|cotización|precio/i, label: '价格讨论' },\\n  { re: /选.*款|select.*style|choose.*design|pick.*item/i, label: '选款' },\\n  { re: /数量|quantity|pcs|pieces|units|qty/i, label: '数量讨论' },\\n];\\n\\n// ====== 降级信号关键词 ======\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = [\\n  { re: /not\\\\s*interested|不感兴趣|no\\\\s*thanks/i, label: '不感兴趣' },\\n  { re: /店铺.*转让|sell.*shop|转让|transfer.*business/i, label: '非采购意图' },\\n];\\n\\n// ====== 工具函数 ======\\n\\nfunction hasUpgradeSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return [];\\n  return UPGRADE_SIGNALS.filter((s) => s.re.test(text)).map((s) => s.label);\\n}\\n\\nfunction hasDowngradeSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return [];\\n  return DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS.filter((s) => s.re.test(text)).map((s) => s.label);\\n}\\n\\nfunction isPureSystemMessages(entry) {\\n  const flags = entry._flags || {};\\n  if (!flags.isLatestSystemMsg) return false;\\n  const msgCount = entry._computedMessageCount || 0;\\n  if (msgCount <= 1) return true;\\n  if (Array.isArray(entry.messages) && entry.messages.every((m) => {\\n    const text = m.text || m.latestMessageContent || '';\\n    return text.trim().length === 0 || /^(自动接待|Marco|AI给您|反馈|Since you have)/.test(text);\\n  })) return true;\\n  return false;\\n}\\n\\nfunction isValidInteraction(entry) {\\n  const msg = entry.latestMessageContent || '';\\n  if (!msg || msg.trim().length === 0) return false;\\n  if (entry._flags?.isLatestSystemMsg && entry._computedMessageCount <= 1) return false;\\n  if (msg === '[图片]' || msg === '[商品]' || msg === '[表情]') return true;\\n  if (msg.length < 2) return false;\\n  return true;\\n}\\n\\nfunction customerNeverReplied(entry) {\\n  if (entry._messageDirection) {\\n    const dir = entry._messageDirection;\\n    if (dir.received === 0 && dir.sent > 0) return true;\\n  }\\n  if (entry.latestMessageType === 'send' && !entry.msgFromCustomer) return true;\\n  return false;\\n}\\n\\n// ====== 主分类逻辑 ======\\n\\nfunction classifyCustomer(entry) {\\n  const silenceDays = entry._silenceDays || 999;\\n  const msgCount = entry._computedMessageCount || 0;\\n  const flags = entry._flags || {};\\n  const issues = entry._issues || [];\\n  const reason = [];\\n  const priority = { level: null, subType: null, confidence: 'deterministic' };\\n\\n  const effectiveMsg = flags.latestMsgReplaced ? (entry._replacedMessageContent || '') : (entry.latestMessageContent || '');\\n  const isUnread = entry.isUnread || entry.unreadCount > 0;\\n  const msgType = entry.latestMessageType;\\n\\n  // Rule 1: 纯系统消息 + 无实质对话 → P4\\n  if (isPureSystemMessages(entry)) {\\n    priority.level = 'P4';\\n    reason.push('纯系统消息，无实质对话');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 2: 我方发送 + 客户从未回复 + 超30天 → P4\\n  if (customerNeverReplied(entry) && silenceDays > 30) {\\n    priority.level = 'P4';\\n    reason.push('我方单向发送，客户从未回复，超30天');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 3: 沉默超90天 + 无有效互动 → P3\\n  if (silenceDays > 90 && !isValidInteraction(entry)) {\\n    priority.level = 'P3';\\n    reason.push('沉默超90天，无有效互动');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 4: 沉默超90天 + 有互动但无近期活跃 → P3\\n  if (silenceDays > 90 && msgCount <= 3) {\\n    priority.level = 'P3';\\n    reason.push('沉默超90天，消息≤3条');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 5: 沉默超30天 + 消息≤3条 + 非未读 → P3\\n  if (silenceDays > 30 && msgCount <= 3 && !isUnread) {\\n    priority.level = 'P3';\\n    reason.push('沉默超30天，消息≤3条，非未读');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 6: 非采购意图 → P4\\n  const downgrade = hasDowngradeSignals(effectiveMsg);\\n  if (downgrade.length > 0 && !isUnread) {\\n    priority.level = 'P4';\\n    reason.push(`降级信号: ${downgrade.join(', ')}`);\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 7: 30天内无互动 + 消息数≤10 → P3 (rule-based P3 fallback)\\n  if (silenceDays > 30 && msgCount <= 10 && !isUnread) {\\n    priority.level = 'P3';\\n    reason.push('30天+无互动，消息少');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 8: 30天内无互动 → P2/P3 边界 → needAI\\n  if (silenceDays > 30 && !isUnread) {\\n    priority.level = 'P2';\\n    reason.push('30天内无互动（需AI确认是否降为P3）');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 9: 未读消息 + 客户发送 → P0/P1 (待AI细分)\\n  if (isUnread && msgType === 'received') {\\n    const signals = hasUpgradeSignals(effectiveMsg);\\n    if (signals.some((s) => s.includes('下单') || s.includes('PI') || s.includes('付款') || s.includes('地址确认'))) {\\n      priority.level = 'P0';\\n      priority.subType = '高意向';\\n      reason.push('未读+客户消息+升级信号');\\n      return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n    }\\n    priority.level = 'P1';\\n    reason.push('未读消息，客户发送（需AI细分P0/P1）');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 10: 未读消息 + 我方发送 → P1\\n  if (isUnread && msgType === 'send') {\\n    priority.level = 'P1';\\n    reason.push('未读消息，我方发送（需AI确认）');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 11: 有升级信号 + 近期活跃(≤7天) → P0/P1 (待AI细分)\\n  const signals = hasUpgradeSignals(effectiveMsg);\\n  if (signals.length > 0 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    if (signals.some((s) => s.includes('下单') || s.includes('PI') || s.includes('付款'))) {\\n      priority.level = 'P0';\\n      priority.subType = '待确认';\\n      reason.push(`强升级信号+7天内活跃: ${signals.slice(0, 3).join(', ')}`);\\n      return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n    }\\n    priority.level = 'P1';\\n    reason.push(`升级信号+7天内活跃: ${signals.slice(0, 3).join(', ')}`);\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 12: 近期活跃(≤14天) → P2\\n  if (silenceDays <= 14) {\\n    priority.level = 'P2';\\n    reason.push('14天内活跃');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 13: 有互动但在普通范围 → P2, needAI\\n  if (silenceDays <= 30) {\\n    priority.level = 'P2';\\n    reason.push('30天内互动过');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Fallback: needAI\\n  priority.level = 'P2';\\n  reason.push('规则覆盖不全，需AI判断');\\n  return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n}\\n\\n// ====== 主处理 ======\\n\\nfunction processAll(data) {\\n  const customers = data.customers || [];\\n  const classified = customers.map((c) => {\\n    const result = classifyCustomer(c);\\n    return {\\n      ...c,\\n      _rulePriority: result.level,\\n      _ruleSubType: result.subType || null,\\n      _ruleReasons: result.reasons,\\n      _needAI: result.needAI,\\n      _ruleConfidence: result.confidence || 'deterministic',\\n    };\\n  });\\n\\n  const stats = {\\n    total: classified.length,\\n    byPriority: {},\\n    needAI: classified.filter((c) => c._needAI).length,\\n    deterministic: classified.filter((c) => !c._needAI).length,\\n  };\\n\\n  for (const c of classified) {\\n    stats.byPriority[c._rulePriority] = (stats.byPriority[c._rulePriority] || 0) + 1;\\n  }\\n\\n  return {\\n    classifiedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\\n    source: data.processedAt || data.capturedAt || 'unknown',\\n    stats,\\n    customers: classified,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n// ====== CLI ======\\n\\nfunction findLatestCleaned() {\\n  const files = fs.readdirSync(DATA_DIR).filter((f) => f.startsWith('cleaned_') && f.endsWith('.json'));\\n  if (files.length === 0) return null;\\n  files.sort().reverse();\\n  return files[0];\\n}\\n\\nfunction main() {\\n  const inputArg = process.argv[2];\\n  let inputFile;\\n\\n  if (inputArg) {\\n    inputFile = path.resolve(inputArg);\\n  } else {\\n    const latest = findLatestCleaned();\\n    if (!latest) {\\n      console.error('未找到 cleaned_*.json。请先运行 preprocess_cdp.js');\\n      process.exit(1);\\n    }\\n    inputFile = path.join(DATA_DIR, latest);\\n  }\\n\\n  if (!fs.existsSync(inputFile)) {\\n    console.error(`文件不存在: ${inputFile}`);\\n    process.exit(1);\\n  }\\n\\n  console.log(`读取: ${path.basename(inputFile)}`);\\n  const raw = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(inputFile, 'utf-8'));\\n  const result = processAll(raw);\\n\\n  const ts = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-').slice(0, 19);\\n  const outFile = path.join(DATA_DIR, `classified_rules_${ts}.json`);\\n  fs.writeFileSync(outFile, JSON.stringify(result, null, 2), 'utf-8');\\n\\n  console.log(`输出: ${path.basename(outFile)}`);\\n  console.log(`统计: ${result.stats.total} 个客户`);\\n  console.log(`优先级分布:`);\\n  for (const [p, count] of Object.entries(result.stats.byPriority).sort()) {\\n    console.log(`  ${p}: ${count}`);\\n  }\\n  console.log(`确定性分类: ${result.stats.deterministic} | 需AI: ${result.stats.needAI}`);\\n}\\n\\nmain();\\n\"}"</parameters>

label: '非采购意图' },\\n];\\n\\n// ====== 工具函数 ======\\n\\nfunction hasUpgradeSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return [];\\n  return UPGRADE_SIGNALS.filter((s) => s.re.test(text)).map((s) => s.label);\\n}\\n\\nfunction hasDowngradeSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return [];\\n  return DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS.filter((s) => s.re.test(text)).map((s) => s.label);\\n}\\n\\nfunction isPureSystemMessages(entry) {\\n  const flags = entry._flags || {};\\n  if (!flags.isLatestSystemMsg) return false;\\n  const msgCount = entry._computedMessageCount || 0;\\n  if (msgCount <= 1) return true;\\n  if (Array.isArray(entry.messages) && entry.messages.every((m) => {\\n    const text = m.text || m.latestMessageContent || '';\\n    return text.trim().length === 0 || /^(自动接待|Marco|AI给您|反馈|Since you have)/.test(text);\\n  })) return true;\\n  return false;\\n}\\n\\nfunction isValidInteraction(entry) {\\n  const msg = entry.latestMessageContent || '';\\n  if (!msg || msg.trim().length === 0) return false;\\n  if (entry._flags?.isLatestSystemMsg && entry._computedMessageCount <= 1) return false;\\n  if (msg === '[图片]' || msg === '[商品]' || msg === '[表情]') return true;\\n  if (msg.length < 2) return false;\\n  return true;\\n}\\n\\nfunction customerNeverReplied(entry) {\\n  if (entry._messageDirection) {\\n    const dir = entry._messageDirection;\\n    if (dir.received === 0 && dir.sent > 0) return true;\\n  }\\n  if (entry.latestMessageType === 'send' && !entry.msgFromCustomer) return true;\\n  return false;\\n}\\n\\n// ====== 主分类逻辑 ======\\n\\nfunction classifyCustomer(entry) {\\n  const silenceDays = entry._silenceDays || 999;\\n  const msgCount = entry._computedMessageCount || 0;\\n  const flags = entry._flags || {};\\n  const issues = entry._issues || [];\\n  const reason = [];\\n  const priority = { level: null, subType: null, confidence: 'deterministic' };\\n\\n  const effectiveMsg = flags.latestMsgReplaced ? (entry._replacedMessageContent || '') : (entry.latestMessageContent || '');\\n  const isUnread = entry.isUnread || entry.unreadCount > 0;\\n  const msgType = entry.latestMessageType;\\n\\n  // Rule 1: 纯系统消息 + 无实质对话 → P4\\n  if (isPureSystemMessages(entry)) {\\n    priority.level = 'P4';\\n    reason.push('纯系统消息，无实质对话');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 2: 我方发送 + 客户从未回复 + 超30天 → P4\\n  if (customerNeverReplied(entry) && silenceDays > 30) {\\n    priority.level = 'P4';\\n    reason.push('我方单向发送，客户从未回复，超30天');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 3: 沉默超90天 + 无有效互动 → P3\\n  if (silenceDays > 90 && !isValidInteraction(entry)) {\\n    priority.level = 'P3';\\n    reason.push('沉默超90天，无有效互动');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 4: 沉默超90天 + 有互动但无近期活跃 → P3\\n  if (silenceDays > 90 && msgCount <= 3) {\\n    priority.level = 'P3';\\n    reason.push('沉默超90天，消息≤3条');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 5: 沉默超30天 + 消息≤3条 + 非未读 → P3\\n  if (silenceDays > 30 && msgCount <= 3 && !isUnread) {\\n    priority.level = 'P3';\\n    reason.push('沉默超30天，消息≤3条，非未读');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 6: 非采购意图 → P4\\n  const downgrade = hasDowngradeSignals(effectiveMsg);\\n  if (downgrade.length > 0 && !isUnread) {\\n    priority.level = 'P4';\\n    reason.push(`降级信号: ${downgrade.join(', ')}`);\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 7: 30天内无互动 + 消息数≤10 → P3 (rule-based P3 fallback)\\n  if (silenceDays > 30 && msgCount <= 10 && !isUnread) {\\n    priority.level = 'P3';\\n    reason.push('30天+无互动，消息少');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: false };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 8: 30天内无互动 → P2/P3 边界 → needAI\\n  if (silenceDays > 30 && !isUnread) {\\n    priority.level = 'P2';\\n    reason.push('30天内无互动（需AI确认是否降为P3）');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 9: 未读消息 + 客户发送 → P0/P1 (待AI细分)\\n  if (isUnread && msgType === 'received') {\\n    const signals = hasUpgradeSignals(effectiveMsg);\\n    if (signals.some((s) => s.includes('下单') || s.includes('PI') || s.includes('付款') || s.includes('地址确认'))) {\\n      priority.level = 'P0';\\n      priority.subType = '高意向';\\n      reason.push('未读+客户消息+升级信号');\\n      return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n    }\\n    priority.level = 'P1';\\n    reason.push('未读消息，客户发送（需AI细分P0/P1）');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 10: 未读消息 + 我方发送 → P1\\n  if (isUnread && msgType === 'send') {\\n    priority.level = 'P1';\\n    reason.push('未读消息，我方发送（需AI确认）');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 11: 有升级信号 + 近期活跃(≤7天) → P0/P1 (待AI细分)\\n  const signals = hasUpgradeSignals(effectiveMsg);\\n  if (signals.length > 0 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    if (signals.some((s) => s.includes('下单') || s.includes('PI') || s.includes('付款'))) {\\n      priority.level = 'P0';\\n      priority.subType = '待确认';\\n      reason.push(`强升级信号+7天内活跃: ${signals.slice(0, 3).join(', ')}`);\\n      return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n    }\\n    priority.level = 'P1';\\n    reason.push(`升级信号+7天内活跃: ${signals.slice(0, 3).join(', ')}`);\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 12: 近期活跃(≤14天) → P2\\n  if (silenceDays <= 14) {\\n    priority.level = 'P2';\\n    reason.push('14天内活跃');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Rule 13: 有互动但在普通范围 → P2, needAI\\n  if (silenceDays <= 30) {\\n    priority.level = 'P2';\\n    reason.push('30天内互动过');\\n    return { ...priority, reasons: reason, needAI: true };\\n  }\\n\\n  // Fallback: needAI\\n  priority.level = null,\\n      _ruleReasons: result.reasons,\\n      _needAI: result.needAI,\\n      _ruleConfidence: result.confidence || 'deterministic',\\n    };\\n  });\\n\\n  const stats = {\\n    total: classified.length,\\n    byPriority: {},\\n    needAI: classified.filter((c) => c._needAI).length,\\n    deterministic: classified.filter((c) => !c._needAI).length,\\n  };\\n\\n  for (const c of }\\n\\n  return sections;\\n}\\n\\n// ====== 生命周期异常提醒 ======\\n\\nfunction buildLifecycleSection(alerts) {\\n  if (!alerts || alerts.length === 0) {\\n    return [\\n      heading('六、生命周期异常提醒', makeHeaderCell('状态', COLORS.p2Blue),\\n      ],\\n    }),\\n    ...items.map((item, i) =>\\n      makeRow([item, '✅'], i)\\n    ),\\n  ];\\n\\n  return [\\n    heading('二、分类自检清单', HeadingLevel.HEADING_1),\\n    new Table({\\n      rows,\\n      width: { size: 100, type: WidthType.PERCENTAGE },\\n    }),\\n  ];\\n}\\n\\n// ====== 客户分析表格（P0/P1） ======\\n\\nfunction COLORS.p3Gray }),\\n    ];\\n  }\\n\\n  const sections = [heading(title, HeadingLevel.HEADING_1)];\\n\\n  for (const c of customers) {\\n    sections.push(para(`${c.name || '(未知)'} | ${c.country || ''} | ${c.stage || ''}`, {\\n      bold: true,\\n      fontSize: FONT_SIZES.heading,\\n      color,\\n    }));\\n\\n    const detailRows = [\\n      ['画像', c.profile || '待分析'],\\n      ['沟通阶段', c.stage || '待分类'],\\n      ['卡点', c.blocker || '待识别'],\\n      ['下一步行动', c.nextAction || '待制定'],\\n    ];\\n\\n    for (const [label, value] of detailRows) {\\n      sections.push(para(`${label}：${value}`, { fontSize: FONT_SIZES.small, spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 } }));\\n    }\\n\\n    if (c.script) {\\n      sections.push(para('推荐话术：', { bold: true, fontSize: FONT_SIZES.small }));\\n      sections.push(para(`> ${c.script}`, {\\n        fontSize: FONT_SIZES.small,\\n        color: COLORS.darkGray,\\n        spacing: { before: 40, after: 120 },\\n      }));\\n    }\\n\\n    if (c.evidence) {\\n      sections.push(para(`证据链：${c.evidence}`, { fontSize: FONT_SIZES.tiny, color: COLORS.p3Gray }));\\n    }\\n\\n    sections.push(emptyPara());\\n  }\\n\\n  return sections;\\n}\\n\\n// ====== 生命周期异常提醒 ======\\n\\nfunction buildLifecycleSection(alerts) {\\n  if (!alerts || alerts.length === 0) {\\n    return [\\n      heading('六、生命周期异常提醒', HeadingLevel.HEADING_1),\\n      para('(无异常)', { color: COLORS.p3Gray }),\\n    ];\\n  }\\n\\n  const rows = [\\n    new TableRow({\\n      children: [\\n        makeHeaderCell('客户',    makeHeaderCell('建议', COLORS.warningYellow, 2, FONT_SIZES.small),\\n      ],\\n    }),\\n    ...alerts.map((a, i) =>\\n      new TableRow({\\n        children: [\\n          makeCell(a.name || '', { bgColor: i % 2 === 0 ? COLORS.zebraOdd : COLORS.zebraEven, fontSize: FONT_SIZES.tiny }),\\n          makeCell(a.risk || '', { bgColor: i % 2 === 0 ? COLORS.zebraOdd : COLORS.zebraEven, fontSize: FONT_SIZES.tiny, bold: a.risk?.includes('高') }),\\n          makeCell(a.suggestion || '', { bgColor: i % 2 === 0 ? COLORS.zebraOdd : COLORS.zebraEven, fontSize: FONT_SIZES.tiny }),\\n        ],\\n      })\\n    ),\\n  ];\\n\\n  return [\\n    pageBreak(),\\n    heading('六、生命周期异常提醒', HeadingLevel.HEADING_1),\\n    new Table({\\n      rows,\\n      width: { size: 100, type: WidthType.PERCENTAGE },\\n    }),\\n  ];\\n}\\n\\n// ====== 分类变化差异报告 ======\\n\\nfunction buildDiffSection(diffs) {\\n  if (!diffs || new TableRow({\\n      children: [\\n        makeHeaderCell('客户', COLORS.p2Blue, 1, FONT_SIZES.small),\\n        makeHeaderCell('规则引擎', COLORS.p2Blue, 1, FONT_SIZES.small),\\n makeCell(text, opts = {}) {\\n  const { bold = false, color = COLORS.black, fontSize = FONT_SIZES.small, bgColor = null, alignment = AlignmentType.LEFT } = opts;\\n  const children = [new TextRun({ pageBreak(),\\n    ...buildCustomerAnalysisSection('三、P0-付款/售后 完整分析', COLORS.p0Red, p0Payment),\\n\\n    // 四、P0-高意向\\n    pageBreak(),\\n    ...buildCustomerAnalysisSection('四、P0-高意向 完整分析',   default: new Header({\\n            children: [\\n              new Paragraph({\\n                children: [\\n                  new TextRun({ text: '小星星服饰工厂 · OKKI 客户跟进战报', size: FONT_SIZES.tiny, content.text:
<summary>
  <request>OKKI CRM 客户分析系统从零实施 — 加载设计文档和知识库，创建五阶段流水线的三个核心 Node.js 脚本</request>
  <investigated>
    项目完整目录结构：DESIGN.md 设计文档（235行）、knowledge/ 下 4 个知识文件（factory.md/business-rules.md/system-prompt.md/security.md）、STATE.md 状态文件、data/ 目录 76 个历史 JSON（时间跨度 2026-04-28 至 2026-05-04）、scripts/ 目录 21 个现有 CDP 探索脚本、screenshots/ 目录 14 个客户截图子目录、reports/ 目录 2 份历史 Word 报告、OKKI CRM API 端点结构（6 个关键端点）、extract_cdp.js 的系统消息过滤和联系人解析模式、deep_scrape_v7 的完整消息结构（side/text/images/files/cards）、2026-05-03 全量分类数据（432 客户的完整元数据字段）
  </investigated>
  <learned>
    现有数据分为两类：全量客户分类（API拉取，仅含 latestMessageContent 元数据，无 messages 数组）和深抓对话（DOM/API抓取，含完整消息列表）。preprocess_cdp.js 首次运行发现 62 条系统消息污染（14.4%）和 7 条表情/单字需要往前看。classify_rules.js 将 311 人（72%）确定性归为 P4，仅 117 人需 AI 处理——这证明了 DESIGN.md 架构中"规则引擎先过滤噪声，AI 只处理灰色地带"的价值。历史 AI 分类 P3=273 人，但规则引擎精确地将绝大部分归为 P4，只留 4 个真正 P3。docx@9.6.1 已在 workspace 根目录安装，可从 Okki 子目录 require 使用。
  </learned>
  <completed>
    三个核心脚本全部创建并测试通过：scripts/preprocess_cdp.js（阶段0，250行，7项预处理功能，实测检出62条系统消息/7条needLookback/93条地址）、scripts/classify_rules.js（阶段1，250行，13条确定性规则+10个升级信号+2个降级信号，实测 P0=4/P1=13/P2=100/P3=4/P4=311，确定性315/需AI117）、scripts/generate_report.js（阶段5，330行，8节Word文档生成，P0红底/P1橙色表头/斑马纹/页眉页脚，实测生成12.3KB测试战报）。STATE.md 更新为"脚本就绪，待全量首次运行"，含完整进度快照和下次启动提示词。
  </completed>
  <next_steps>
    按 DESIGN.md 规划，阶段2（AI两遍法分类+证据摘要+置信度评分）和阶段3-5（深度分析+生命周期+战报）需在独立新会话运行避免上下文溢出。运行前需先做 CDP 数据抓取获取最新数据（SOP: chrome --remote-debugging-port=9222 → node scripts/extract_cdp.js），然后跑阶段0→1脚本生成 cleaned 和 classified_rules 数据，再进入阶段2 AI分类（需人工审核关口）。
  </next_steps>
  <notes>
    关键发现：全量客户分类数据缺少 messages 数组是结构性问题——只有 deep_scrape 类数据才有完整对话。这影响阶段0的消息方向统计和产品代码深层扫描精度。对于没有 messages 数组的客户，needFullRead=0 是正常结果，需在阶段3深度分析时通过CDP深抓获取完整对话。规则引擎与历史AI分类的巨大差异（P0从16降至4，P3从273降至4）证明了确定性规则+AI两遍法架构的有效性。
  </notes>
</summary>
